author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Actually, CFLAGS set in a downstream build.rs won't affect an upstream -sys crate's cc::Build. The cc crate reads CFLAGS from the environment at cargo invocation time, not from DEP_ vars. The correct approach: set CFLAGS='-include signgam_compat.h' as a cargo config env var for Windows targets. We'll create a .cargo/config.toml entry and document the workaround, plus create the compat header.
